name: checkbox
description: A styled native input[type=checkbox] (two-state and tri-state / indeterminate). The native element carries role=checkbox, Space/Tab activation, checked/disabled, and form-submission for free. The `sr-only peer` pattern hides the input visually while keeping it in the accessibility tree; a peer-driven aria-hidden sibling renders the custom box with an inline SVG check and dash glyph. Three sizes (sm/md/lg) use --lv-space-4/5/6 (16/20/24 px) as the box dimension; checked, focus-visible, disabled, and aria-invalid states are expressed via Tailwind peer-* utilities over --lv-* tokens. Two attribute channels: `attrs` (TRUSTED raw $unsafe -- STATIC author-typed strings such as l:model) and `dataAttrs` (SAFE escaped Map for dynamic per-row data-* values). The indeterminate DOM property is set client-side by checkbox.enhancer.ts (component-specific enhancer; coordinator registers installCheckbox in index.ts).
docs: Copies the checkbox partial to your JTE root at lievit/checkbox.jte, reached as @template.lievit.checkbox(...). Renders a native input[type=checkbox] (role=checkbox, Space/Tab, form-submit for free) styled with the sr-only-peer + custom-box pattern. Pass `checked=true` for the initial checked state; pass `indeterminate=true` to render data-indeterminate="true" (the enhancer sets el.indeterminate after hydration so the browser reflects aria-checked="mixed"). Wire to a WIRE field with `attrs="l:model=\"field\""` (TRUSTED raw channel, static string). Carry a SAFE dynamic data-* (filter key, row id) via `dataAttrs=java.util.Map.of("rowid", row.id())` -- each value HTML-escaped, never through attrs. Pass `ariaLabel` when no sibling label element is associated (a11y guard). The `id` param lets a sibling `<label for>` wire to this control; omitting it auto-generates a stable id. The source is yours: edit freely.
